title: Wither Potions
description: A mod that adds the potion of wither and all potion form
body:
## Description
This is a vanilla-like mod  that adds the potion of wither, a potion only present in bedrock edition. You can craft all form of the potion in the brewing stand, just as you would with any other vanilla potion.

## Crafting guide

**Base form:** Awkward potion + wither rose

**Long form:** Wither potion + redstone

**Strong form:** Wither potion + glowstone

**Spash (Trowable):** Wither potion + gunpowder

**Lingering (Effect stays):** Wither potion + dragon's breath
